group_gate_phase_indicate: Indicates progress of your group member in the AG Ironclad
groupgate_homemap_requirement: In order to access this ace gate, you must first finish ace gate - Homemap Σ [SOLO]
build_by_parts_hint: Constructing this gate isn't like other gates. To build this gate, you must either craft the gate parts via assembly - or clear out the other Ace Gate sectors first - this will give you a chance to obtain an unique part! You need parts from following gates:
q_desc_2: Great, you have survived your encounter with the Blukaners. Now that you've proven yourself, it's time to head deeper into space.
tutorial_5: Navigate to the Missions Icon Prompt Select "First assignment" and "Accept Mission". After Navigate and select "change mode". Here you'll be able to see the rewards, Overview/Progress and the description of your mission. NOW GO DESTROY THOSE PESKY BLUKANERS AROUND THE MAP!
tutorial_9: Now lets take a 'Expedition into Unknown' Select that mission Pilot! Follow mission in damaging the Elite Blukaner.
star-formation_tooltip:
Cross formation
Increases rocket launcher damage by 40% and shield penetration by 10%.
Reduces speed by 5%
pnc-formation_tooltip:
Cannon formation
Increases laser damage dealt to players by 5% and honor gained by 5%.
Reduces shield penetration by 10%
dba-formation_tooltip:
Triple arrow formation
Increases rocket damage by 30% and shield penetration by 10%
Reduces shields by 20%
dia-formation_tooltip:
Shield formation
Recharges your shields by 1% per second up to maximum 8,000
Reduces HP by 30%
chev-formation_tooltip:
Shuttle formation
Increases rocket damage by 65%
Reduces HP by 20%
moth-formation_tooltip:
Scorpion formation
Increases shield penetration and HP by 20%
Depletes 1% of your shields per second
crab-formation_tooltip:
Crab formation
Increases shield absorbtion by 20%
Reduces ship speed by 15%
heart-formation_tooltip:
Red Plus formation
Increases HP and shields by 20%
Reduces ship damage by 5%
barrier-formation_tooltip:
Line formation
Increases damage dealt to Saturn Faction members and XP gained by 5%
Reduces shield absorbtion by 15%
bat-formation_tooltip:
Wing formation
Laser damage to all aliens increased by 10% and XP gained by 8%
Reduces speed by 15% and shields by 5%
fbat_shop_desc:
Wing formation
Laser damage to all aliens increased by 10% and XP gained by 8%
Reduces speed by 15% and shields by 5%
s_skill_frostification_tooltip:
Frostification:
Stops any ship from moving, but decreases damage dealt to them by 30%!
